chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text: 524 - وَ لَمَّا مَاتَ إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ خَرَجَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فَتَقَدَّمَ اَلسَّرِيرَ بِلاَ حِذَاءٍ وَ لاَ رِدَاءٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.524 - When Ismail ibn Jaafar passed away, Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) came out and walked ahead of the bier without shoes and without an outer garment (ridā').
